subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-06-08
subcodes.first_line: The body politic today is greatly in need of a physician. It is similar to a human body... The disease which afflicts the body politic is lack of love
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @harmony of science and religion, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer
